what_happened: Hourly captures mostly landed; one overnight gap needed repair and morning vigor looked slightly better.
what_was_expected: Cron should have covered every hour and the daytime window should have shown stable light-on behavior.
taste_yield_meaning: No clear taste/yield tradeoff changed yet, but stable vigor is mildly encouraging.
model_change: Keep the slight-vigor-improvement prediction open, lower confidence in capture reliability, and ask for gardener confirmation if tomorrow stays ambiguous.

attribution.system: One missed hourly capture required repair.

open_questions: Do the next daylight captures confirm the vigor improvement?
